cards.safeSummary: Task-board output was too large; planner should recover from bounded card counts and concise status notes.

overflowRecovery.message: Task-board output exceeded the safe contract budget. Use a compact status summary without raw board rows.

safeSummary: Pool requires replan from sanitized task-board overflow summary.

overflowRecovery.message: Pool status contains a sanitized overflow summary only; raw task-board output is intentionally omitted.
